focus: [D3-A2/D3] self-attested vs content-bound proof of utilization: proof must echo a value that exists only in the loaded file or carry a content hash

graphEvents.label: What proves a selected sk-design packet and shared context were used rather than merely named as loaded?
The context-loaded and proof-of-application cards require loaded-file and evidence fields, but no file hash, anchor echo, or unique content value
proof_check.py verifies proof-field labels and READY, but not file paths, digests, anchor echoes, or line-bound content
The live skill-benchmark evidence records activation, stated resources, tool calls, and observed read paths, but not content-bound utilization proof
A sourceProof schema using sha256 or verified anchor echoes can make utilization proof deterministic on the local repo
A utilization proof must bind each claimed loaded file to current file content via sha256 or a checker-verified echoed anchor before READY or benchmark pass claims

label: Context-loaded and proof-of-application cards require loaded/evidence rows but no hash or anchor echo
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE on a test corpus; ADVISORY for final design quality

label: proof_check.py accepts field presence and READY without validating file content
Live benchmark evidence records activation, stated resources, tool calls and paths, not content-bound utilization
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for benchmark lanes; ADVISORY for production runtime unless ready claims run through the checker

label: A sourceProof schema using sha256 or verified anchor echo can make utilization proof deterministic
A utilization proof must bind every claimed loaded file to current file content via sha256 or checker-verified echoed anchor before READY or benchmark pass claims
Context Loaded Card records yes/no loaded rows without content-bound proof
proof_check.py matches proof labels and READY but has no path/hash/anchor validation
skill-benchmark live evidence captures observedReads and stated routing but no file digest or anchor echo

direction: Treating a filled context manifest or READY card as utilization proof by itself
reason: The live cards and proof_check.py validate shape and claimed readiness, but do not require any value bound to the loaded file contents.
